thread.title: New York decriminalizes adultery after more than a century
thread.title_full: New York decriminalizes adultery after more than a century

author: Magdalena Del Valle - Bloomberg News (TNS)
title: New York decriminalizes adultery after more than a century
text:
NEW YORK — Cheating on your spouse is no longer a crime in New York.
Gov. Kathy Hochul signed a bill Friday repealing an obscure and rarely-enforced law that made adultery punishable by up to three months in prison.
